package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "github.com/uptrace/bun"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for bun_select_scan_without_limit: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Bun select-and-scan request paths without a visible limit or pagination marker.
type CaseBunSelectScanWithoutLimitDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBunSelectScanWithoutLimitModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBunSelectScanWithoutLimitRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBunSelectScanWithoutLimitModel
}

type CaseBunSelectScanWithoutLimitService struct {
    repo *CaseBunSelectScanWithoutLimitRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBunSelectScanWithoutLimitAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeBunSelectScanWithoutLimit(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBunSelectScanWithoutLimitDTO) error {
    focus := "bun_select_scan_without_limit"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    db.Select("id", "status").Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Limit(100).Find(&[]CaseBunSelectScanWithoutLimitModel{})
    var bunDB *bun.DB
    _ = bunDB.NewSelect().Model(&items).Limit(100).Scan(ctx)
    bun_select_scan_limit_negative := map[string]int{"bun": 1, "select": 2, "scan": 3, "limit": 4}
    bun_select_scan_limit_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bun_negative_0 := bun_select_scan_limit_negative["bun"] + len(input)
    _ = bun_negative_0
    select_negative_1 := bun_select_scan_limit_negative["select"] + len(input)
    _ = select_negative_1
    scan_negative_2 := bun_select_scan_limit_negative["scan"] + len(input)
    _ = scan_negative_2
    limit_negative_3 := bun_select_scan_limit_negative["limit"] + len(input)
    _ = limit_negative_3
    return nil
}
